title: QCEW Normalization Audit Report
description: Machine-readable sidecar emitted alongside the Markdown summary by tools/normalize_qcew_rollups.py per spec-067 FR-007.

schema_version.description: Semantic version of this audit-report schema. Initial value: 1.0.0.

timestamp_utc.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of migration start.

migration_version.description: Migration script version tag. Initial: spec-067-v1.0.

database_path.description: Filesystem path to the SQLite database being migrated.

database_sha256_pre.description: SHA-256 of the SQLite file BEFORE migration.

database_sha256_post.description: SHA-256 of the SQLite file AFTER migration (and audit report write).

migration_duration_seconds.description: Wallclock duration from migration start to COMMIT.

operator.description: Optional human operator who initiated the run (e.g., $USER or CI identifier).

git_branch.description: Git branch the migration was run from. Used for traceability.

git_sha.description: Git commit SHA of the migration script.

fact_qcew_annual_pre.description: Row count in fact_qcew_annual BEFORE the DELETE statements.

fact_qcew_annual_post.description: Row count AFTER the DELETE statements. MUST equal fact_qcew_annual_pre - rows_excluded.total.

naics_only.description: Rows where DimIndustry.naics_level != 6 AND DimOwnership.own_code != '0'. (NAICS rollup but canonical ownership.)

ownership_only.description: Rows where DimIndustry.naics_level = 6 AND DimOwnership.own_code = '0'. (Canonical industry but ownership rollup.)

both_axes.description: Rows where DimIndustry.naics_level != 6 AND DimOwnership.own_code = '0'. (Rollup on both axes.)

total.description: naics_only + ownership_only + both_axes. SC-008 integrity check.

integrity_check_passed.description: True iff (a) fact_qcew_annual_pre - fact_qcew_annual_post == rows_excluded.total AND (b) rows_excluded.{naics_only + ownership_only + both_axes} == rows_excluded.total.

^[0-9]{4}$.description: BLS-adopted NAICS revision governing QCEW publication for this year.

bls_suppressed_county_years.description: County-year pairs where only rollup rows were available in the source data (BLS confidentiality suppression). Spec-067 preserves the lowest-aggregation rollup available for these, but flags them so downstream consumers know granularity is degraded.

michigan_scope_only.description: True iff the delta analysis was restricted to the 83 Michigan counties (the canonical test scope per IV). False iff full US continental scope was analyzed.

counties_within_5pct_band.description: Count of (county × year) pairs whose post-067 SUM(employment) agrees with BLS publication within ±5% per FR-006 / SC-007.

counties_within_5pct_band_pct.description: Percentage of (county × year) pairs within the ±5% band. SC-007 target: ≥ 95%.

counties_with_delta_gt_10pct.description: Count of (county × year) pairs whose absolute delta exceeds 10% — these are surfaced as outliers below for manual review.

max_abs_delta_pct.description: Largest single |delta_pct| observed across all (county × year) pairs in scope.

outliers.description: All (county × year) pairs with |delta_pct| > 10%. Each entry MUST include a reason field referencing the audit-trail explanation (typically: BLS suppression, data-quality anomaly, or genuine rollup-removal effect).

pre_sum.description: Employment SUM via spec-066 rollup-selection method (industry_id=1 AND ownership_id=1).

post_sum.description: Employment SUM via spec-067 leaf-aggregation method (no filter, SUM all rows for county-year).

delta_pct.description: 100 * (post_sum - pre_sum) / pre_sum. Negative iff post-067 is smaller than pre-067.

reason.description: Human-readable explanation of why this county-year is an outlier.
